scripts.deploy: vite build && npx wrangler pages deploy dist --project-name=inboil
scripts.deploy:site: cd site && pnpm build && npx wrangler pages deploy dist --project-name=inboil-site
scripts.deploy:preview: vite build && npx wrangler pages deploy dist --project-name=inboil --branch=$(git branch --show-current)
scripts.dev:jam: npx concurrently -n sig,vite -c blue,green "cd workers/signaling && npx wrangler dev" "VITE_SIGNALING_URL=ws://localhost:8787/ws vite"
